name: python3-six
title: python3-six
description:
Python 2 and 3 compatibility library
Six is a Python 2 and 3 compatibility library. It provides utility
functions for smoothing over the differences between the Python versions
with the goal of writing Python code that is compatible on both Python
versions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-six because Python 2 and 3 compatibility library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-six as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-six with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-six --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
